overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia in golden Toussaint armor ascending an ornate stone terrace staircase. The clip showcases a bright Mediterranean-inspired coastal setting with clear skies, culminating in a panoramic overlook of the city of Beauclair and surrounding turquoise waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate stone terrace staircase with garden landscaping

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily up the curved stone staircase, passing ornamental pillars with flower arrangements and stone balustrades

entered.detail: curved stone steps ascending the terrace
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars
large stone planter with flowers atop pillars
lush red flowering shrubs lining the terrace edge
stone balustrade with arched openings overlooking the sea

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a sun-drenched stone staircase on an ornate terrace, flanked by flowering bushes and stone balustrades. The path curves upward with decorative urns and pillars visible ahead, while the bright blue sky and distant sea provide a vivid backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace viewpoint overlooking coastal city and bay

events.description: reaches the top of the staircase and the view opens up to reveal the panoramic coastal cityscape
character slows and stops to observe the view, then begins panning right

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses at the terrace overlook, slowly turning to take in the panoramic view of the coastal city, turquoise waters, and distant mountains

entered.detail: sprawling city of Beauclair with red-tiled roofs and towers along the coastline
turquoise body of water surrounding the city peninsula
hazy blue mountain range on the horizon
tall spires and towers of the palace complex

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the terrace summit, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of the coastal city Beauclair with its distinctive red roofs and spires, set against turquoise waters and distant mountains. Geralt stands at the stone arch railing, slowly panning to take in the expansive vista including the palace towers to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends a sun-drenched terrace to reveal a sweeping panoramic vista of a coastal city. It begins with Geralt climbing an ornate stone staircase flanked by flowering bushes and decorative balustrades, moving upward as the path curves toward distant pillars and urns. As he reaches the summit, the enclosed perspective of the stairs opens abruptly into a breathtaking wide shot of Beauclair, with its red roofs and spires contrasting against turquoise waters. The scene then expands further as the camera pans across the horizon, shifting from the distant mountains to the towering palace spires to the right.
